OPENCODE_GO_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the OpenCode Go API backend.

OPENCODE_GO_API_KEY.description: API key for authenticating with the OpenCode Go API.

DEFAULT_MODEL_ID.description: Default LLM model ID to use (e.g. `claude-sonnet-4-20250514`).

APP_PUBLIC_URL.description: The canonical public URL protected by Cloudflare Access. This is configured as a plain Wrangler var because it is not secret.

UPLOAD_TOKEN_SECRET.description: A random secret for signing short-lived attachment upload/read URLs. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

CLOUDFLARE_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN.description: Full Cloudflare Access team domain, for example `https://your-team.cloudflareaccess.com`.

CLOUDFLARE_ACCESS_AUD.description: Application Audience (AUD) tag from the Cloudflare Access application.

DEV_AUTH_EMAIL.description: Optional local-only development identity used on localhost when no Access JWT is present.
